name: Tax Equivalent Yield Calculator
seo_description: Use our free tax equivalent yield calculator to quickly estimate tax_equiv based on muni_yield, tax_rate. Not registration needed.
example_label: Calculate TEY: 4% tax-free yield, 30% tax bracket.

range_hints.tax_rate: Between 10% and 50% according to tramo impositivo

result_context: The efficiency equivalente muestra qué return taxable necesitarías to igualar the bono municipal
formula_display: Rendimiento equivalente = Yield municipal / (1 - rate impositiva)
steps: Convert the rate impositiva a decimal
Divide the yield municipal per this result
mistakes: Not Convert the percentage of taxes a decimal
desc: Free online tax equivalent yield calculator. Enter muni yield % and tax rate % to get instant results.
